headline: Washed Out Private Credit Stocks Approach Technical Inflection Points
summary: Publicly traded lenders and alternative asset managers have come under pressure amid concerns over credit quality and liquidity.  KKR & Co  is clearly struggling, down 27% so far this year.  The stock is now 39% off its most recent 52-week high but is attempting to end a seven-week losing streak.

headline: KKR Co-CEOs Keep Buying the Dip. They Snap Up Another $8.8 Million in Stock.
summary: KKR’s  top executives have continued to buy the dip in their own stock.  Co-CEOs Joseph Bae and Scott Nuttall purchased a combined $8.8 million worth of KKR common stock last week, according to regulatory filings.  Independent board director Mary Dillon followed suit on Monday, buying shares worth $2 million.
